title: Kisangel 2Pcs White Ceramic Wall Hanging Flower Pots, Succulent Plant Planters with Drainage for Indoor Home Decor, Plant Hangers for Room, Office, and Garden
features: Stylish Design for Any Home Decor: This ceramic flower pot features a sleek and elegant white design that complements any home or office decor. Its natural style makes it perfect for displaying succulents, cacti, or small plants, adding a touch of greenery to your space

Ceramic Construction: Crafted from high-quality ceramic material, this flower pot is lightweight yet durable, ensuring use. Its fine craftsmanship makes it resistant to breakage, ideal for both hanging and wall placement

Versatile Plant Holder: Perfect for succulents or cacti, this hanging plant pot can be used as a wall planter or placed on a desk or tabletop. Its compact size and minimalist design make it a functional and attractive addition to any room

Enhance Your Indoor Garden: Bring beauty into your home or office with this stylish ceramic plant holder. It’s the ideal present for plant lovers or a perfect way to refresh your workspace with a touch of nature

Multi-Functional Use: Whether you’re decorating your living room, bedroom, or office, this ceramic flower pot is a versatile and chic solution for displaying plants. It’s also great for organizing small items or as a decorative piece on its own
